top_signals.title: Chrysler Reverses Luxury Strategy, Turns to $30k Models
top_signals.summary: Stellantis is making a dramatic U-turn, bringing back affordable Chrysler SUVs, reviving Dodge muscle cars, and expanding Ram with new SUVs and pickups. As inflation crushes car buyers, the automaker is abandoning its luxury-first strategy to win back mainstream America. Bloomberg's Auto Reporter Gabrielle Coppola joined Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about the pivot and what's ahead for the carmaker. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
